PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\(Resolve-Path sporlab-netlify.zip\)\); $zip.Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName; $zip.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\sporlab-zip-inspect"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive sporlab-netlify.zip -DestinationPath $tmp; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $tmp | Select-Object @{n="Path";e={$_.FullName.Replace\($tmp+'\\',''\)}}, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp)
